commands.repair_reason: Contributor-provided proof is still required, and the code blockers should be fixed before maintainer review continues; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while the real-proof gate is missing.; Needs attention: the diff introduces CodeQL-flagged regex parsing over untrusted GitHub comment bodies.; Review finding: [P1] Add the real ClawSweeper bot logins — src/clawsweeper.ts:2584 - [P2] Replace the comment-body regex... commands.review_summary:
The PR filters ClawSweeper self-noise and command-only comments from review context, extracts compact previous-review state, and adds telemetry/tests for filtered context.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the primary PR regression: the provided GitHub context shows ClawSweeper comments are authored by clawsweeper[bot], while the new allow-list contains only clawsweeper. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-provided proof is still required, and the code blockers should be fixed before maintainer review continues; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while the real-proof gate is missing.

target.title: Filter noisy PR ingestion comments
target.body:
## Summary
- filter ClawSweeper self-noise and exact command-only comments out of review context
- extract the latest ClawSweeper durable review as compact previous-review state
- pass filtered comments into related-item discovery and expose filtered counts in context telemetry

## Validation
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
